title: Senior Doctor - Symbiosis Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Symbiosis Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Symbiosis Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Symbiosis Hospital:
Symbiosis Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Symbiosis Hospital!
